title: Project Index
description: Canonical shape for .ai-dev-kit/registries/index.yaml -- the top-level project graph the /dev-kit/index dashboard renders. Aggregates every other registry, the package.json, per-feature SPEC / DESIGN-READY / TEST-MANIFEST artifacts, and 30-day run rollups into ONE file. Refreshed by scripts/sync-project-index.ts on pre-commit. Treat as read-only; edits are overwritten.

last_synced_on.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last sync-project-index.ts run. Doctor warns when stale.

stack.description: High-level stack tags derived from package.json deps (e.g. 'next', 'react', 'tailwind', 'vitest').

spec_path.description: Relative path to the project-level SPEC (typically features/_SEED-SPEC.md).

status.description: Lifecycle state. `drafting`: SPEC.md only. `designing`: DESIGN-READY.md exists but not marked ready. `building`: design ready + TEST-MANIFEST.yaml exists. `shipped`: most recent run ended with status=success.

spec.description: Relative path to the SPEC.md for this feature.

design_ready.description: True if features/<name>/DESIGN-READY.md exists and is signed off.

test_manifest.description: Relative path to TEST-MANIFEST.yaml, or null when absent.

flows.description: Count of flows declared in TEST-MANIFEST.yaml. 0 when no manifest.

last_run.description: run_id (ULID) of the most recent run tagged to this feature.

last_run_status.description: status field of the most recent run (success|failed|active|aborted).

entries.description: Entry count if countable. Strings are allowed for registries whose shape is a map rather than an entries[] list.

last_synced_on.description: last_synced_on read from the registry itself; null when the registry has never been synced or the field is absent.

totals_30d.description: Activity rollup for the last 30 days. Sourced from .ai-dev-kit/state/runs/history/*.json and .ai-logs/**/*.jsonl.
